turns.q: Can it arrive gift-ready, and how fast can it ship?
turns.replyTail:
.

Regarding larger items like mattresses or beds, we provide free express delivery. Our goal is always to deliver your new bedding as quickly as possible.

While our products are delivered in high-quality packaging, we do not currently offer a specific gift-wrapping service.

If you have a specific request regarding a pending order or need more precise delivery details, I invite you to submit a written request through our contact form: https://hello.tediber.com/fr-FR/contact. 🙂⭐️

,
Maintenant
